phase_goal: Build the cross-domain technique portfolio per Mission Update 002: dataset-agnostic evaluation harness (Cranfield migrated), BM25 baselines on all ~14 public BEIR datasets sanity-checked against published numbers, Technique x Dataset evidence matrix for the Phase 1 portfolio, runtime query embedding to unblock arch-0.3-bge, public /api/beir/* endpoints, and Superset-Not-Filter scope classification (Universal / Domain-conditional / Dormant) leading to ARCH-0.5.
mission_update_amendments: Mission Update 003 (2026-07-14): articles are authored by Ferosh personally, only after phase implementation is complete and validated; agents never initiate or draft article work or post content anywhere unless Ferosh explicitly asks. Supersedes the article-per-mission mandate for delegation purposes.

completed_phases.final_deliverable: SLAB-RS article series published at https://feroshjacob.github.io/series/self-learning-agent-based-retail-search/ (Parts 1-4, A-0002/A-0003/A-0004)
